title: arenaria modesta subsp. tenuis
intro: Arenaria modesta subsp. tenuis, also known as a dwarf sandwort, is a plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as improving digestive issues, reducing stress, and supporting immune function. Arenaria modesta subsp. tenuis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
